column4: Massive golden gates stand between the living and the dead. A robed figure checks a very long list.
A path of clouds stretches westward. Souls drift past like leaves on a river.
column13: The main road of the afterlife. Spirits of all kinds travel here. Some remember who they were.
column22: The path narrows and descends. The light dims. This way leads to darker places.

column4: An impossible garden of perfect flowers. The temperature is always comfortable. Peace radiates. The spectral residents here seem agitated. Several ghosts are clustered around a spot where the ethereal mist has been burned away, leaving a perfect circle of absolute clarity.
column8: circle:The circle of clarity is about three feet across. Within it, you can see the ground with perfect, almost painful sharpness — every grain of dirt, every blade of grass rendered in impossible detail. The ghosts whisper that something 'too real' passed through here, burning away the veil between life and death. One ghost keeps repeating - 'Round. It was round. And it was ANGRY.'
column10:
,9006|Hall of Heroes|afterlife|Statues of the greatest warriors who ever lived. Their spirits train here eternally.|safe|||||,9007|The Judgment Hall|afterlife|A vast courtroom where deeds are weighed. The scales are impossibly precise.||||||,9008|Purgatory — Waiting Room|afterlife|Uncomfortable chairs and old magazines. The wait is eternal. A number dispenser reads '∞.'||||||,9009|The Dark Descent|afterlife|Stairs spiral downward into increasing darkness. Wailing echoes from below.||||||,
,9010|Elysian Fields|afterlife|Rolling green hills under a perpetual golden sunset. The worthy rest here in peace.|safe|||||,9011
column13: Spirits of warriors spar endlessly. Death has not dulled their skills. If anything, they've improved.
column19:
,9012|The Crossroads of Souls|afterlife|Where paths diverge. Up leads to light. Down leads to shadow. Sideways leads to rebirth.||||||,9013|Limbo — Grey Expanse|afterlife|An endless grey plain. Nothing happens here. Nothing ever will. The ultimate punishment: boredom.||||||,9014|Hell's Gate|afterlife|A gate of black iron radiating heat. Screams from beyond. A demon bouncer checks the list.|safe|||||,
,,9015|The Reincarnation Pool|afterlife|A pool of swirling silver light. Souls step in and emerge as something new. Somewhere new.||||||,9016|Snake Way — Start|afterlife|A narrow winding path above clouds. One misstep and you fall to the realm below. It stretches for miles.||||||,9017|Snake Way — Middle|afterlife|The path continues endlessly. Your legs burn. The end is not visible. Keep going.||||||,9018|Snake Way — End|afterlife|Finally. The path widens to a small planet floating in the void. A tiny house sits on top.||||||,
,,9019|The Forgotten Shore|afterlife|A beach of grey sand beside a grey sea. Souls who were forgotten by the living wash up here.||||||,9020
column22: A tiny planet with its own gravity. A small house, a car, and a monkey. The master trains only the worthy.
column28:
,9021|The Void Between|afterlife|The space between life and death. Nothing exists here. Not even nothing. It's less than nothing.||||||,,
,,,9022
column31: Beyond this, even spirits cannot return. Whatever lies past is truly the end. Or the beginning.
